title: Violet's Sunbeam Schedule
text:
## Sunbeam Schedule

Prepared by Violet, tortie head cat and senior light inspector.

**Morning beam:** Begins at {number} o'clock on the {adjective} {place}.

**Required setup:** One {color} blanket, no {plural noun}, and {food} served {adverb}.

**Unauthorized visitors:** Zebby the black kitten may {verb} nearby for {number} seconds. Matilda must not {verb} the beam with her {body part}.

**If clouds appear:** Violet will become {emotion}, knock over a {object}, and begin {verb ending in -ing}.

**Backup beam:** The {adjective} window.
